title: SpaceX Owns a Real Business That Makes Big Money
title_cn: SpaceX 拥有真正赚大钱的业务
summary: A simple view of SpaceX is that it’s a low-cost rocket launcher that created the profitable Starlink satellite business and which is now burning cash to build orbital data centers and colonize Mars. Starlink doesn’t have the lead role in SpaceX’s $1.8 trillion initial public offering. But it is the real business inside the company, and the telecoms industry and its regulators can ill afford to be complacent about the disruptive threat it poses.

title: Morgan Stanley's Wilson Sees Big Shift From 60/40 Strategy
title_cn: 摩根士丹利 (Morgan Stanley) 的威尔逊 (Wilson) 认为 60/40 战略将发生重大转变
summary: Mike Wilson, Morgan Stanley's chief US equity strategist and CIO, says the recent equity and debt offerings signal a healthy market. Speaking with Matt Miller on "Bloomberg Open Interest," Wilson says there's enough capital out there to absorb all of the recent IPO activity. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bond Traders Keep Bets on a Fed Hike in 2026 After CPI Data
title_cn: CPI 数据公布后，债券交易员仍押注美联储 2026 年加息
summary: Bond traders maintained bets that the Federal Reserve will raise interest rates by the end of the year, even after a soft US core inflation reading eased pressure on Chairman Kevin Warsh to act sooner.

title: DCC Prepared to Accept Improved £5.7 Billion KKR Buyout Bid
title_cn: DCC 准备接受改进后的 57 亿英镑 KKR 收购要约
summary: DCC Plc said it was prepared to accept an improved offer from buyout firms KKR & Co. and Energy Capital Partners, which valued the firm at about £5.7 billion ($7.6 billion).

title: Amazon Inks $17.5 Billion Loan in Financing Led by Citigroup
title_cn: 亚马逊在花旗集团领投的融资中获得 175 亿美元贷款
summary: Amazon.com Inc. has inked a $17.5 billion loan from a group of banks led by Citigroup Inc., the tech company said in a regulatory filing.

title: The Rich Are Getting Richer: What Do They Want From Wealth Managers?
title_cn: 富人越来越富：他们想从财富管理机构那里得到什么？
summary: Merryn Somerset Webb sits down with Capgemini's Gareth Wilson to discuss the latest World Wealth Report, the rise of robo-advisors and family offices, and why traditional wealth management firms are facing growing competition. They also debate the question: Do investors want empathy from their wealth managers, or simply better returns? (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks Fall as US-Iran Tensions Offset CPI Relief: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 由于美伊紧张局势抵消消费者物价指数的缓解，股市下跌：市场结束
summary: A relatively tame inflation report brought a degree of relief to Wall Street, but failed to lift stocks amid heightened geopolitical tensions that are keeping energy costs elevated and threatening further price pressures.

title: US Inflation Picks Up to Three-Year High, Eroding Paychecks
title_cn: 美国通胀升至三年高位，侵蚀薪资
summary: US inflation accelerated in May to the fastest pace in more than three years as the Iran war pushed up energy prices, outstripping Americans’ pay gains.

title: Man Accused of Igniting Massive Los Angeles Fire Goes on Trial
title_cn: 被控点燃洛杉矶大火的男子接受审判
summary: The man accused of “maliciously” starting the most destructive wildfire in Los Angeles history last year is set to face a jury over arson charges.

title: Metals Drop on Renewed Middle East Tensions, US Rate Outlook
title_cn: 中东紧张局势再度升级、美国利率前景导致金属价格下跌

title: Oracle Earnings Pose Next Test for Suddenly Shaky AI Stock Rally

summary: The rally in artificial intelligence-related stocks is suddenly on shaky footing, and Oracle Corp.’s earnings report after the close represents the group’s next test.

title: SpaceX IPO Draws Billions in Orders From Middle East Funds
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股吸引了中东基金数十亿美元的订单
summary: Gulf wealth funds have put in orders for shares worth several billions of dollars in SpaceX’s initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter, the latest indication of the region’s ambitions to continue playing a lead role in bankrolling the global artificial intelligence buildout.

title: Gold Slumps as Faster US Inflation Fuels Fed Rate Hike Fears
title_cn: 美国通胀加速加剧美联储加息担忧，金价暴跌
summary: Gold and other precious metals held big losses after headline US consumer prices rose by the most in more than three years, fueling ongoing worries that the Federal Reserve will soon need to start raising interest rates.

title: Here Are the Key Takeaways From the US CPI Report for May
title_cn: 以下是美国 5 月份 CPI 报告的主要要点
summary: Here are the key takeaways on the US consumer price index report for May, released Wednesday:

title: Here Comes the Age of the Rockstar CFO
title_cn: 摇滚明星首席财务官的时代已经到来
summary: Financial decision making has never been more strategic.

title: Lenovo on Strategy and Growth
title_cn: 联想战略与增长
summary: Winston Cheng, Senior Vice President & Chief Financial Officer, Lenovo said the AI infrastructure boom is probably “the greatest infrastructure build in the history of mankind,” when discussing company outlook with Bloomberg’s Sangmi Cha at Bloomberg Invest 2026 in Hong Kong.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sweden’s Top Pension Gatekeeper Wants to Keep Private Credit Out
title_cn: 瑞典最高养老金看门人希望将私人信贷拒之门外
summary: The top official deciding how Swedes invest much of their pension savings said he’s against offering them access to private markets funds.

title: US Inflation Accelerates in May, While Core CPI Softens
title_cn: 美国5月通胀加速，核心CPI走软
summary: US inflation accelerated in May with the Iran war pushing up energy prices, as the consumer price index climbed 4.2% from a year earlier, the most since early 2023. The core CPI, which excludes food and energy, increased 0.2% from April and 2.9% from a year earlier. Michael McKee breaks down the numbers on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Argentine Peso Drops Most Over Eight Weeks Since Midterm Selloff
title_cn: 阿根廷比索自中期抛售以来八周内跌幅最大
summary: An incipient decline in the Argentine peso is gaining momentum, as investors grow more risk averse and policymakers in Buenos Aires loosen their grip on the volatile currency.

title: CIBC to Offer SpaceX Access Through Canadian Depositary Receipt
title_cn: CIBC 将通过加拿大存托凭证向 SpaceX 提供接入服务
summary: Canadian Imperial Bank of Commerce is set to offer Canadian investors access to SpaceX through a vehicle that gives local investors access to global stocks.

title: SpaceX IPO Is a 'White Knuckle' Moment, Ives Says
title_cn: 艾夫斯表示 SpaceX IPO 是一个“紧张”时刻
summary: Dan Ives of Wedbush Securities talks about the upcoming SpaceX IPO and how it could impact tech stocks. He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic considera peligroso a Mythos. ¿Por qué amplía su acceso?
title_cn: 人择认为神话是危险的。为什么要扩大访问范围？
summary: ¿Qué tan peligrosa debe ser una inteligencia artificial para que su creador se niegue a lanzarla al público, pero al mismo tiempo amplíe su acceso? Anthropic asegura que su modelo Mythos puede descubrir vulnerabilidades críticas y facilitar ciberataques sofisticados. Entonces, ¿por qué cada vez más organizaciones pueden usarlo? (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Wall Street Braces for SpaceX With Stress Test, ‘Watch Parties’
title_cn: 华尔街通过压力测试和“观看派对”为 SpaceX 做好准备
summary: Wall Street has spent months debating how much SpaceX is worth. Behind the scenes, a different challenge has occupied the institutions responsible for bringing it public: preparing the plumbing systems needed to support what could become the largest IPO in history.

title: EU Budget Leeway for Meloni and Peers Gets Slammed by Watchdog
title_cn: 梅洛尼和同行的欧盟预算回旋余地受到监管机构的猛烈抨击
summary: The European Commission shouldn’t have given in to pressure from governments seeking extra leeway for energy-related aid, the European Union’s budget watchdog said.

title: Apollo’s Kleinman Says Private Equity Lost Its Way on Deals
title_cn: 阿波罗的克莱曼表示私募股权在交易中迷失了方向
summary: Private equity “lost its way a little bit” during the easy-money era and firms will “have to start capitulating for sure on valuations” after borrowing costs normalized, warned Scott Kleinman, co-president of Apollo Global Management Inc.

title: US Premarket Movers for June 10, 2026
title_cn: 2026 年 6 月 10 日美国上市前走势
summary: S&P 500 Index futures fall 1.1% as of 7:45 a.m. in New York as weakness in technology continues and the US and Iran exchanged strikes overnight.

title: Banks Pay 7% on Dollar Deposits as India Seeks Fresh Foreign Currency
title_cn: 印度寻求新的外币，银行支付 7% 的美元存款利率
summary: Indian lenders have sharply raised rates on foreign-currency deposits to lure the nation’s overseas residents, offering an early test of the central bank’s recent measures to bring in capital flows to support the rupee.

title: Iraq Boosts Oil Exports as More Tankers Transit Strait of Hormuz
title_cn: 随着更多油轮通过霍尔木兹海峡，伊拉克增加石油出口
summary: Iraq is accelerating oil loadings at its main port and boosting shipments out of the Persian Gulf in the latest sign that the region’s top OPEC producers are getting more barrels through the vital Strait of Hormuz.

title: MTN Finalizing Nigeria, Uganda Fintech Spinoffs; Adds Alipay
title_cn: MTN 敲定尼日利亚、乌干达金融科技分拆项目；添加支付宝
summary: MTN Group Ltd. is finalizing the spinoffs of its Nigerian and Ugandan financial-technology operations as part of a reorganization of its mobile-money unit to allow Mastercard Inc. and other strategic buyers to take minority stakes in its fintech businesses.

title: Roblox Wants Deluge of Child Sex Abuse Cases Moved Out of Court
title_cn: Roblox 希望将大量儿童性虐待案件移出法庭
summary: Myra’s daughter got a Roblox account when she was 8. For more than a decade, the immersive gaming platform had advertised itself as a safe place for kids to play, and during the pandemic, there weren’t many other options.

title: Amazon’s Trucking Push Sparks New Slide in Transport Stocks
title_cn: 亚马逊的卡车运输业务引发运输股新一轮下滑
summary: Shares of several large trucking companies plunged on Wednesday after Amazon.com Inc. announced an expansion of its shipping service that has already shaken the transportation and logistics sector and unsettled investors.

title: KKR’s Agrawal Says Market May Be Underestimating AI Power Needs
title_cn: KKR 的 Agrawal 表示市场可能低估了人工智能的电力需求
summary: AI’s furious pace of growth means power demands could be much higher than people realize, according to KKR & Co.’s Raj Agrawal.

title: Trump Media, TAE No Longer Pursuing Truth Social Spinoff
title_cn: 特朗普媒体、TAE 不再追求真相社交衍生品
summary: Trump Media & Technology Group, TAE Technologies Inc. and Texas Ventures Acquisition III have decided not to continue pursuing a spinoff of some media assets, including Truth Social.

title: Microsoft Has an Answer to Anti-AI Boos From the Class of 2026
title_cn: 微软对 2026 届的反人工智能嘘声做出了回应
summary: In recent weeks, the Class of 2026 has made its displeasure with AI abundantly clear, loudly booing speakers touting the technology during commencement speeches.

title: SpaceX IPO Said to Be Significantly Oversubscribed
title_cn: 据称 SpaceX 首次公开募股大幅超额认购
summary: SpaceX's initial public offering has attracted demand from institutional investors for multiple times the available shares, according to people familiar with the matter. Banks are expected to stop taking orders from institutional investors at the market close on Wednesday. The IPO is set to price June 11 and trade the following day. Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Boeing Unveils Ghost Bat Upgrades in Pursuit of German Orders
title_cn: 波音公司推出“幽灵蝙蝠”升级版以满足德国订单
summary: Boeing Co.’s MQ-28 Ghost Bat uncrewed combat plane can now carry weapons internally, fly farther and deliver a bigger payload — upgrades the company hopes will give it the edge over rival Helsing GmbH in the competition for German orders.

title: KKR’s McVey Says Fed’s Warsh to ‘Do No Harm’ at June Meeting
title_cn: KKR 的麦克维表示美联储的沃什在 6 月会议上“不会造成伤害”
summary: Henry McVey, balance sheet CIO and head of global asset and macro allocation at KKR, discusses his expectations for the upcoming Federal Reserve decision and offers insight into the firm’s midyear outlook.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Morgan Stanley 'Doubling Down' on European AI Trade
title_cn: 摩根士丹利“加倍押注”欧洲人工智能贸易
summary: Morgan Stanley Chief European Equity Strategist Marina Zavolock discusses the artificial intelligence trade and why she has a strong personal conviction on Europe. "The fundamentals are just outstanding, and they're just going higher," she tells Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei Has Only One Direct Report
title_cn: Anthropic 首席执行官达里奥·阿莫迪 (Dario Amodei) 只有一名直接下属
summary: One of the most powerful AI chief executives has almost no direct reports at a moment when other tech leaders are widening their spans of control.

title: Silver Lake’s Lucas Goes Back to School For Lessons in AI
title_cn: 银湖大学的卢卡斯重返学校学习人工智能课程
summary: Christian Lucas, one of the top executives at specialist technology investor Silver Lake, is back in the classroom as he and his firm seek an edge in age of artificial intelligence.

title: Inside Anthropic, the $965 Billion AI Titan
title_cn: 价值 9650 亿美元的人工智能巨头 Anthropic 内部
summary: Emily Chang meets Anthropic co-founders Dario and Daniela Amodei for a rare, in-depth discussion of the startup's origin story, its battles with the Pentagon and how the company says it intends to put safety first in the high-stakes AI race. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI Backs AI Startup Fielding Compliance, Underwriting Tasks
title_cn: OpenAI 支持人工智能初创公司部署合规性、承保任务
summary: Poetic, an artificial intelligence startup, is emerging from stealth with $50 million in funding from OpenAI and other investors to help businesses streamline complex tasks, ranging from insurance underwriting to financial compliance.

title: US Leads AI Innovation with Vertical Integration Amid Supply Chain Concerns
title_cn: 美国在供应链担忧中通过垂直整合引领人工智能创新
summary:
Lei Qiu, head of thematic equities at AllianceBernstein, discusses the evolving landscape of AI investment and innovation, emphasizing the United States’ competitive edge in AI technology and infrastructure. Despite geopolitical tensions, particularly between the US and China, the US maintains a strong position due to its leading tech companies’ strategic investments and rapid innovation in AI architecture.

(Corrects spelling of company) (Source: Bloomberg)

title: TSMC’s Monthly Sales Climb 30% on Sustained AI Chip Demand
title_cn: AI芯片需求持续旺盛，台积电月销售额增长30%
summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. reported monthly sales rose 30%, reflecting continued strength in global demand spurred by a rush to build AI infrastructure. Neil Campling reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: India Puts Starlink Launch on Hold
title_cn: 印度暂停星链发射
summary:
India has effectively frozen approvals for Starlink, according to people familiar with the matter. Officials are concerned about the use of satellite terminals in the Iran war, creating a new hurdle for Elon Musk's internet service in a key growth market.

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BNP Sees US Tech IPOs Fueling Appetite for Deals in Europe
title_cn: 法国巴黎银行认为美国科技公司首次公开募股将刺激欧洲交易的兴趣
summary: Mega IPOs by some of the largest privately held tech companies are likely to fuel appetite for stock sales in Europe’s tech industry as well, according to a top BNP Paribas SA investment banker.

title: Credit Agricole CEO Says AI Anxiety Must Come to an End
title_cn: 法国农业信贷银行首席执行官表示人工智能焦虑必须结束
summary: Credit Agricole SA Chief Executive Officer Olivier Gavalda is trying to temper worries related to artificial intelligence in the banking sector, as many executives have said implementing such technology will lead to workforce reductions.

title: Orlando Bravo on Software, ‘Pretty Stuck’ PE, Mega IPOs
title_cn: Orlando Bravo 谈软件、“陷入困境”的 PE、大型 IPO
summary: Orlando Bravo, co-founder and managing partner at Thoma Bravo, says the “SaaSpocalyse” is finished as he discusses slower deal activity in private equity and sees smaller firms struggling for attention amid mega IPOs. He speaks with Dani Burger at the SuperReturn conference in Berlin. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Firms’ Explosive Growth Improves the Math for Late-Stage Investors
title_cn: 人工智能公司的爆炸性增长提高了后期投资者的数学能力
summary: Later investments are producing much higher returns than in the past

title: All the Ways Wall Street Gets Paid to Fund AI Boom
title_cn: 华尔街为人工智能繁荣提供资金的所有方式
summary: Enormous valuations are rewriting the IPO playbook.

title: TDK Buys US 3D-Printing Startup to Amp Up AI Ecosystem Bet
title_cn: TDK 收购美国 3D 打印初创公司，加大人工智能生态系统押注
summary: TDK Corp. is spending as much as $400 million to buy Fabric8Labs Inc., a US startup that’s developed a technology that can be used to improve data-center cooling systems.

title: Baidu CFO Tells 'Odd Lots' About How OpenClaw Founder Sought to Collaborate
title_cn: 百度首席财务官讲述了 OpenClaw 创始人如何寻求合作的“奇怪的事情”
summary: Baidu CFO Henry He is asked about Dario Amodei's past work at the Chinese company and instead reveals how OpenClaw's creator "asked Baidu to work with him" to beef up search skills for the popular AI personal assistant. He spoke to Bloomberg's Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway in a live taping of the Odd Lots podcast at Bloomberg Invest Hong Kong. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SVP Sees a ‘Lot of Canaries in the Coal Mine’ in Private Markets
title_cn: 高级副总裁在私募市场中看到“煤矿里的金丝雀”
summary: Victor Khosla, the founder of credit investor Strategic Value Partners, speaks to Bloomberg's Dani Burger at the SuperReturn conference in Berlin about warning signs in private markets. “There are entire sectors like private equity, like real estate, which are constipated — they can't sell," Khosla says. "Private credit just joined the party a little bit too.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BizLink to Buy Blackstone’s Interplex in $850 Million Deal
title_cn: BizLink 将斥资 8.5 亿美元收购 Blackstone 的 Interplex
summary: Taiwan’s BizLink Holding Inc. has agreed to acquire Blackstone Inc.’s information and communications technology business Interplex Datacom.

title: Cambridge Aerospace in Talks to Raise at $3.5 Billion Valuation
title_cn: 剑桥航空航天公司正在洽谈将估值提高至 35 亿美元
summary: Cambridge Aerospace, a British defense technology startup developing interceptor systems to protect against drones and cruise missiles, is in discussions to raise approximately $300 million at a valuation of around $3.5 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Ant International Considers Raising $1 Billion to Boost Growth
title_cn: 蚂蚁金服考虑筹集 10 亿美元以促进增长
summary: Ant Group Co.’s international business is considering raising about $1 billion to accelerate growth, according to people familiar with the situation.

title: Horizons Middle East & Africa 6/10/2026
title_cn: 中东和非洲地平线 6/10/2026
summary: Horizons Middle East & Africa is your daily spotlight on one of the world's fastest-growing regions. Live from Dubai, we bring you the latest global markets and analysis, plus news-making interviews, with a special focus on MEA. All that and more, as you head to the office in the Gulf, pause for lunch in Hong Kong, or start your day in London or Johannesburg.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Paramount’s Middle East Billions in Warner Bid Get EU Probe
title_cn: 派拉蒙影业向华纳竞购中东数十亿美元遭欧盟调查
summary: Paramount Skydance Corp.’s $110 billion takeover of Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. is being reviewed under the European Union’s Foreign Subsidies Regulation, with regulators probing involvement of Middle Eastern funds helping to bankroll the takeover.

title: Brazil Central Bank Seeks Autonomy to Protect Pix, Oversight
title_cn: 巴西央行寻求自治以保护 Pix 和监督
summary: Brazil’s central bank is facing pushback from President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva’s allies and some of its own employees as it seeks greater budget and staffing control, saying resource constraints are hampering oversight of the country’s increasingly complex financial system.

title: Professional Investors Pan SEC Reporting Overhaul in Survey
title_cn: 专业投资者泛证交会调查报告改革
summary: Professional investors are resisting a bid by Wall Street’s top regulator to reduce how frequently US public companies share information with the market, according to an industry survey.

title: US Says $11.4 Billion Tied Up in IEEPA Tariff Refund Appeal
title_cn: 美国称 IEEPA 关税退款上诉中被困 114 亿美元
summary: A judge urged the Trump administration to back off its appeal of his order to fully refund $166 billion in tariffs overturned by the US Supreme Court, saying it was unnecessary and would only create more delays for importers to get their money back.

title: CFTC Floats Prediction Market Rule to Crack Down on War Bets
title_cn: CFTC 推出预测市场规则以打击战争押注
summary: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission unveiled a proposal for prediction markets Wednesday that would crack down on bets related to war, terrorism and assassination.

title: Bill Gates Arrives for Closed-Door Epstein Panel Testimony
title_cn: 比尔·盖茨抵达爱泼斯坦闭门小组作证
summary: Microsoft Corp. co-founder Bill Gates arrived at the US Capitol complex Wednesday for closed-door testimony to the House Committee investigating the late financier Jeffrey Epstein.

title: Trump Says Iran Will ‘Pay the Price’ for Delaying Talks
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗将为推迟谈判“付出代价”
summary: US President Donald Trump said Iran would “pay the price” for delaying negotiations for an interim peace deal, after renewed attacks overnight put further strain on a fragile two-month truce.

title: Hong Kong Fund Managers Set for Pay Bump in New Tax Plan
title_cn: 香港基金经理将在新税收计划中加薪
summary: Hedge fund managers in Hong Kong are set to benefit from a change to the city’s tax laws, which will effectively eliminate taxes on performance-related income for some funds.

title: US Operations in Nigeria Kill Hundreds of IS-Linked Fighters
title_cn: 美国在尼日利亚的行动杀死了数百名与伊斯兰国有关的武装分子
summary: The US said it has killed about 200 Islamic State-linked fighters in Nigeria since operations began in the West African nation.

title: Trump and Netanyahu’s Close Alliance Tested by Iran Endgame
title_cn: 特朗普和内塔尼亚胡的紧密联盟受到伊朗残局的考验
summary: The push and pull illustrates the different interests of the two leaders

title: Trump Says Iran Must ‘Pay the Price’ for Taking Too Long on a Deal
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗必须为协议拖延太久而“付出代价”
summary: President Donald Trump posted a warning on social media Wednesday that Iran has taken too long to come to terms and will “pay the price.” Tyler Kendall reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: America's Seniors to Face Healthcare ‘Calamity’ If Trump Expels Haitians
title_cn: 如果特朗普驱逐海地人，美国老年人将面临医疗保健“灾难”
summary: The Supreme Court will decide whether Trump can end the protected status of thousands of immigrants. Some fear a healthcare calamity.

title: Russia Sends Additional Military Equipment to Madagascar
title_cn: 俄罗斯向马达加斯加运送更多军事装备
summary: Russia sent an additional consignment of military equipment to Madagascar to help re-equip the island nation’s Military Engineering Corps.

title: Lula Widens His Lead Over Flávio Bolsonaro Ahead of Vote
title_cn: 卢拉在投票前扩大了对弗拉维奥·博尔索纳罗的领先优势
summary: President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva widened his lead over Senator Flávio Bolsonaro after the challenger was embroiled in a corruption scandal and the US increased pressure on Brazil ahead of October’s election, a new poll showed.

title: US, Iran Exchange Strikes, Putting Talks on Peace Deal at Risk
title_cn: 美国与伊朗交锋，和平协议谈判面临风险
summary: The US and Iran exchanged strikes overnight, jolting their two-month-old truce and endangering talks aimed at securing lasting peace in the Middle East.

title: Philippines, Japan Plan Sea Border Talks Amid China Warning
title_cn: 在中国发出警告之际，菲律宾和日本计划举行海上边界谈判
summary: The Philippines intends to pursue talks on maritime borders with Japan despite opposition from Beijing, according to Manila’s Foreign Affairs Secretary Ma. Theresa Lazaro.

title: Germany’s Global Ambitions Are Taking a Hit
title_cn: 德国的全球野心受到打击
summary: Berlin failed to win a non-permanent seat at the UN Security Council for the first time.

title: UK Treasury Resists Defense Spending Push in 11th-Hour Talks
title_cn: 英国财政部在第 11 小时的会谈中抵制国防开支推动
summary: The UK Treasury continues to resist a push to speed up an increase in defense spending, just days out from unveiling the country’s long-delayed military investment plan.

title: Hungary Unveils Anti-Corruption Bill to Access EU Funds
title_cn: 匈牙利公布反腐败法案以获取欧盟资金
summary: Hungarian Prime Minister Peter Magyar’s administration has filed legislation to unlock funds the European Union had blocked over concerns about corruption and rule of law under former leader Viktor Orban.

title: US, Iran Trade Fire After Helicopter Downed Near Hormuz
title_cn: 直升机在霍尔木兹附近坠落后，美国与伊朗交火
summary: The US and Iran exchanged strikes overnight after President Donald Trump retaliated against Tehran for shooting down an American Apache helicopter which was patrolling the Strait of Hormuz. Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Afghanistan Says 13 Killed in Pakistan Cross-Border Strikes
title_cn: 阿富汗称巴基斯坦跨境袭击造成13人死亡
summary: Afghanistan said Pakistani strikes overnight in its eastern provinces killed 13 people, including children, renewing tensions between the neighbors that have clashed for months leaving hundreds dead on both sides.

title: Suez Canal Gets Oil-Tanker Boost Amid Hormuz Strait Shutdown
title_cn: 霍尔木兹海峡关闭期间苏伊士运河油轮数量增加
summary: The number of oil tankers crossing Egypt’s Suez Canal surged by almost a third in April and drove revenue to the highest since early 2024, as the closure of the Strait of Hormuz spurred an alternative Red Sea energy route.

title: Ethiopia’s Ruling Party Streaks Ahead in Early Vote Count
title_cn: 埃塞俄比亚执政党在早期计票中领先
summary: Ethiopia’s ruling party took a commanding lead as preliminary results trickled in from elections that are widely expected to hand Prime Minister Abiy Ahmed another five-year term.

title: US & Iran Trade Strikes, Testing Ceasefire Agreement | Daybreak Europe 6/10/2026
title_cn: 美国和伊朗贸易打击，测试停火协议|黎明欧洲 6/10/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. 

US forces carried out strikes against Iran hours after President Donald Trump blamed Tehran for shooting down an American military helicopter off the coast of Oman. Iran’s joint military command said it had targeted “several US bases in the region.”

Stocks resumed their slide as technology shares remained under pressure and investors trimmed positions ahead of a key inflation reading in the US. Gold dropped.

And Anthropic is widely releasing a version of Mythos that will be blocked from carrying out cybersecurity tasks, months after warning that the powerful artificial intelligence model could spot and exploit vulnerabilities in critical software.

Today's guests: Pilar Gomez-Bravo, MFS Investment Management, Co-CIO of Fixed Income; Julian Salisbury, Co-CIO, Sixth Street. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Swedes’ Support for Euro Entry Fades With Krona Seen as Buffer
title_cn: 瑞典人对欧元加入的支持减弱，克朗被视为缓冲
summary: Swedes’ enthusiasm for joining the euro area fell for a second successive year, signaling they remain confident in the krona and its ability to act as a buffer for the largest Nordic economy in turbulent global markets.

title: Police, Protesters Clash in Kenya over US Ebola Facility
title_cn: 肯尼亚警察与抗议者因美国埃博拉设施发生冲突
summary: Kenyan police fired teargas at protesters demonstrating against a planned quarantine facility for US servicemen and citizens exposed to the Ebola virus. Bloomberg's Helen Nyambura reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Xi Cements Sway Over North Korea as Kim Names China Priority
title_cn: 金正恩将中国列为优先事项，习近平巩固了对朝鲜的影响力
summary: Kim Jong Un feted Chinese President Xi Jinping with two days of lavish celebrations in Pyongyang, calling ties with China a “top priority” in a clear message that Beijing, not Moscow, remains North Korea’s most important partner.

title: Japan and Malaysia Agree on Deeper Maritime Defense Cooperation
title_cn: 日本和马来西亚就深化海上防务合作达成一致
summary: Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi and her Malaysian counterpart Anwar Ibrahim agreed to further cooperation on defense and energy supplies, an alignment based on common concerns over China’s maritime claims and the economic disruptions from the Iran war.
